MSG.NAME: logfile save data failed. errno is %d, num is %d @log_file_file.c(100),ERROR
logfile save data failed. errno is %d, num is %d @log_file_file.c(106),ERROR
logfile remove file [%d] failed. errno is %d @log_file_file.c(237),DBG
logfile save record head failed, ret = 0x%x @log_file_file.c(325),ERROR
logfile save record data failed, ret = 0x%x @log_file_file.c(334),ERROR
